completion_summary: Executed the preregistered current-contract PPO step-0 versus 25,600-step learning gate for all four tasks at source 099028d. All eight checkpoints passed exact manifest 0.3, sidecar 0.2, task-specific observation-hash, deterministic replay, and clean-process load checks; 3/4 tasks showed learning signal and behavior completions rose 11 to 254, but aggregate runtime-domain failures rose 11 to 31, so the preregistered hard gate failed and the full 20-run matrix was correctly forbidden. Recorded 102,400 training steps, 3,094.390625 CPU seconds, zero GPU seconds, retained the source-drift attempt transparently, and preserved pre-v0.4.8 weights as non-resumable diagnostics only. Validation: 26 focused/adjacent tests passed, Ruff and mypy passed, JSON/hash/diff/claim audits passed. Reference repositories and Bench were not accessed. Known limitation: no current-contract PPO checkpoint is selected and ppo_method_ready remains false pending a separately claimed runtime-domain remediation. Implementation commit 79daf76; integration commit 812457c.
notes: The completed pre-v0.4.8 PPO claim remains immutable. Old selected checkpoints are historical diagnostics only and cannot enter the current index or current runtime. This claim reads but does not modify SAC-owned shared writer/runner/tests, never accesses Bench or reference feedback, and may close with a preregistered fail-closed negative result if the current-contract learning gate fails. Source gate: origin/main 70e2d8e with manifest 0.3, sidecar 0.2, and exact observation hashes.
scope: Archive the invalidated pre-v0.4.8 PPO selections, run a preregistered current-contract step-0 versus trained PPO learning gate, and conditionally execute the four-task five-seed current-contract PPO Train/Dev matrix with fail-closed selection, deterministic replay, clean-load, and resource evidence.
